assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Clearly states Extended provides 'up to 24 months of support' and contrasts with Regular's '14 months' in the tradeoffs table

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Extra cost: Only during extended period (months 15-24)' and has a dedicated cost implications section

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Table shows 'Version availability: Same as Regular during standard support' indicating same versions are available

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: While it mentions missing new Kubernetes features as a consideration for when to upgrade, it doesn't explicitly warn about technical debt accumulation from staying on older versions

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Step 1 of migration includes 'Verify current version is available in Extended' with the specific gcloud command to check

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Recommendations section lists 'You need longer support windows for compliance' and describes it as good for organizations wanting 'maximum control over minor version timing'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: States that minor upgrades happen 'except at the very end of extended support' and recommends upgrading 'Before current minor reaches end of standard support'

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Extended channel does NOT auto-upgrade minor versions (except at the very end of extended support)' and emphasizes manual triggering is required
